---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Kaffeine
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or console logs to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 20.11]
- **Kaffeine Version**: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- **Deployment**: [e.g. local dev, Vercel, self-hosted]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. If you're running a self-hosted instance, include relevant details about your setup.
